title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Colliers India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Colliers India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Colliers India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Colliers India:
Colliers India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colliers India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
